competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Offside, Korea Republic. Seol Young-Woo is caught offside.
Foul by Hwang In-Beom (Korea Republic).
Foul by Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic).
Attempt missed. Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right.
Attempt missed. Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Luis Romo.

events.description: 布赖恩·古铁雷斯射门偏出。 路易斯·罗莫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lee Han-Beom (Korea Republic).
Foul by Érik Lira (Mexico).
Offside, Korea Republic. Son Heung-Min is caught offside.
Offside, Mexico. Jorge Sánchez is caught offside.
Julián Quiñones (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Kim Seung-Gyu (Korea Republic). Assisted by Roberto Alvarado with a cross.

events.description: 基尼奥内斯射正。 阿尔瓦拉多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Offside, Korea Republic. Lee Jae-Sung is caught offside.
Offside, Mexico. Roberto Alvarado is caught offside.
Offside, Korea Republic. Seol Young-Woo is caught offside.
Foul by Jesús Gallardo (Mexico).
Attempt missed. Seol Young-Woo (Korea Republic) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is high and wide to the left.
Attempt blocked. Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Son Heung-Min.

events.description: 李强仁射门被封堵。 孙兴慜参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Lee Jae-Sung (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Mexico 0, Korea Republic 0.
Second Half begins Mexico 0, Korea Republic 0.
Attempt missed. Jesús Gallardo (Mexico) left footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Brian Gutiérrez.

events.description: 热苏斯·加利亚多射门偏出。 布赖恩·古铁雷斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Julián Quiñones with a cross.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射门被封堵。 基尼奥内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico).
Offside, Mexico. Julián Quiñones is caught offside.

events.description: 黄希灿 登场，李在成 离场
吴贤揆 登场，孙兴慜 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt blocked. Hwang In-Beom (Korea Republic) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Foul by Paik Seung-Ho (Korea Republic).
Offside, Korea Republic. Seol Young-Woo is caught offside.
Lee Han-Beom (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 奥贝德·巴尔加斯 登场，路易斯·罗莫 离场
奥贝林-皮内达 登场，布赖恩·古铁雷斯 离场
严智星 登场，金纹奂 离场
杨贤俊 登场，薛英佑 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Yang Hyun-Jun (Korea Republic).

Attempt saved. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the centre of the goal by Kim Seung-Gyu (Korea Republic). Assisted by Julián Quiñones with a cross.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射正。 基尼奥内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Eom Ji-Sung (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Korea Republic. Yang Hyun-Jun is caught offside.

events.description: 赵贵成 登场，白胜浩 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Hwang Hee-Chan.

events.description: 李强仁射门偏出。 黄希灿参与进攻。
圣地亚哥·吉梅内斯 登场，劳尔·希门尼斯 离场
伊斯列尔·雷耶斯 登场，阿尔瓦拉多 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Hwang Hee-Chan (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 塞萨尔·韦尔塔 登场，基尼奥内斯 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Obed Vargas (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Kim Seung-Gyu (Korea Republic). Assisted by Orbelín Pineda.

events.description: 奥贝德·巴尔加斯射正。 奥贝林-皮内达参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Cho Gue-Sung (Korea Republic) header from very close range is saved in the centre of the goal by Raúl Rangel (Mexico). Assisted by Eom Ji-Sung with a cross.

events.description: 赵贵成射正。 严智星参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Yang Hyun-Jun (Korea Republic) left footed shot from very close range is saved in the bottom right corner by Raúl Rangel (Mexico).
Delay in match because of an injury Raúl Rangel (Mexico).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Israel Reyes.
Attempt missed. Lee Han-Beom (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Lee Kang-In with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 李韩范射门偏出。 李强仁参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Cho Gue-Sung (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Lee Kang-In with a cross.

events.description: 赵贵成射门被封堵。 李强仁参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Johan Vásquez.
Attempt missed. Oh Hyeon-Gyu (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Lee Kang-In with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 吴贤揆射门偏出。 李强仁参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Lee Gi-Hyuk.
